시편 61:1.content: Hear my cry, God. Listen to my prayer.

시편 61:2.content: From the end of the earth, I will call to you when my heart is overwhelmed. Lead me to the rock that is higher than I.

시편 61:3.content: For you have been a refuge for me, a strong tower from the enemy.

시편 61:4.content: I will dwell in your tent forever. I will take refuge in the shelter of your wings.

시편 61:5.content: For you, God, have heard my vows. You have given me the heritage of those who fear your name.

시편 61:6.content: You will prolong the king’s life. His years will be for generations.

시편 61:7.content: He shall be enthroned in God’s presence forever. Appoint your loving kindness and truth, that they may preserve him.

시편 61:8.content: So I will sing praise to your name forever, that I may fulfill my vows daily.
